professional_summary: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer and AI Specialist with 5+ years of experience designing scalable agentic workflows, building distributed microservices, and integrating advanced LLMs (Gemini, Claude) into production. Proven track record of automating complex web workflows and optimizing system architectures.

highlights: Architected an agentic web navigation framework using Gemini 2.5 and Playwright, reducing data collection workflow latency by 45%.
Led a team of 3 engineers to develop real-time LLM-orchestrated scrapers resolving complex dynamic DOM shifts dynamically.
Deployed scalable vector search systems (Qdrant) processing over 10M records daily with semantic filtering.
Designed and maintained Go-based microservices executing 50,000+ API requests per second with 99.99% uptime.
Migrated legacy monolithic job scheduling queue to RabbitMQ and Redis, boosting throughput by 300%.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
